japanese_title: 6月29日（月）高市内閣支持2ポイント上昇68%、ファストリ 取引先の違法就労厳しく監査
english_translation: June 29 (Monday): Support for the Takaichi Cabinet rises 2 points to 68%; Fast Retailing to strictly audit suppliers' illegal employment.

chunks.meaning: Fast Retailing (abbreviation for Uniqlo's parent company)

japanese_title: 6月28日（日） 対米投資 巨額のドル調達は難路、KDDIが楽天に揺さぶり 回線貸し出しの協業縮小も
english_translation: June 28th (Sunday): US Investment – Massive Dollar Procurement Faces Difficult Path; KDDI Pressures Rakuten, Also Reducing Cooperation on Line Lending

chunks.japanese: 巨額のドル調達は難路
chunks.romaji: Kyo-gaku no Doru chōtatsu wa nanro
chunks.meaning: Securing a huge amount of dollars is a difficult path

chunks.japanese: 回線貸し出しの協業縮小も
chunks.romaji: Kaisen kashidashi no kyōgyō shukushō mo
chunks.meaning: Also, a reduction in cooperation for line lending

japanese_title: 6月27日（土） 川崎重工 エアバスと防衛ドローン、個人の資産運用 AIチャットで完結
english_translation: June 27 (Sat) Kawasaki Heavy Industries and Airbus on defense drones; Personal asset management completed via AI chat

japanese_title: 6月26日（金）日経平均７万円　株価指数について知ろう〜with NIKKEI
english_translation: June 26th (Friday) Nikkei Average 70,000 Yen: Let's Learn About Stock Price Indices ~ with NIKKEI

chunks.meaning: let's learn / let's know (volitional form of shiru)

japanese_title: 6月26日（金）フジHD SBIとメディア事業提携、米大手ステーブルコイン 日本企業向け参入へ
english_translation: June 26th (Friday): Fuji HD to partner with SBI on media business; Major US stablecoin to enter the Japanese market for companies.

japanese_title: 6月25日（木）経済安保に特別会計活用 高市首相 中長期経財計画の策定表明へ、オマーン ホルムズ海峡にタンカー脱出回廊
english_translation: June 25th (Thursday) Prime Minister Takaichi to announce the formulation of a medium-to-long-term economic plan utilizing special accounts for economic security, and an escape corridor for tankers in Oman's Strait of Hormuz.

chunks.japanese: 中長期経財計画の策定表明へ
chunks.romaji: Chū-chōki keizai keikaku no sakutei hyōmei e
chunks.meaning: Towards announcing the formulation of a medium-to-long-term economic plan

japanese_title: 6月24日（水）欧州の防衛ドローン企業が日本に製造拠点 輸出視野 丸紅が進出支援、日産株主総会 ルノーが「みずほ色」に反発
english_translation: June 24th (Wednesday): European Defense Drone Company to Establish Manufacturing Base in Japan with an Eye on Exports; Marubeni Supports Expansion. Nissan Shareholders' Meeting: Renault Objects to 'Mizuho Color'.

chunks.meaning: "Mizuho color" (refers to the perceived influence of Mizuho Financial Group)

japanese_title: 6月23日（火）JERAが米で大型火力発電 AIデータ拠点に併設、英国のスターマー首相が辞任表明
english_translation: June 23 (Tuesday) JERA to build large-scale thermal power plant co-located with AI data hubs in the US; UK Prime Minister Starmer announces resignation

japanese_title: 6月22日（月）コンビニより多い歯科医が減少、預金の5割 相続で首都圏に集中
english_translation: June 22nd (Mon) - The number of dentists (which is more than convenience stores) is decreasing; 50% of savings concentrate in the Tokyo metropolitan area through inheritance.

chunks.meaning: concentrating in the Tokyo metropolitan area

japanese_title: 6月21日（日）メガ銀の年間配当初の2兆円へ、米 日本に中距離ミサイル装置
english_translation: June 21 (Sunday): Megabanks' initial annual dividend payment reaching 2 trillion yen; US deploys mid-range missiles in Japan.

japanese_title: 6月20日（土） 戦略17分野 フィジカルAIに10.5兆円、取締役の過半が「社外」主要企業の4割に
english_translation: June 20 (Sat) - 10.5 trillion yen for 17 strategic fields of physical AI; majority of board directors are 'outside' at 40% of major companies

japanese_title: 6月19日（金）ワールドカップと経済〜with NIKKEI
english_translation: June 19th (Friday) World Cup and Economy ~with NIKKEI

japanese_title: NIKKEI THE PITCH会議室 第21回 【IVS2026直前スペシャル版！】CVC担当者がIVSを100倍有効活用するための「IVSの歩き方」
english_translation: NIKKEI THE PITCH Conference Room Episode 21: [IVS 2026 Pre-Event Special Edition!] 'How to Navigate IVS' for CVC Managers to 100x More Effectively Utilize IVS

chunks.meaning: for the purpose of / in order to

japanese_title: 6月19日（金）日経平均7万円 史上最速の大台替わり、ChatGPT内に広告表示 日本でOpenAIが展開
english_translation: June 19th (Friday): Nikkei Average hits 70,000 yen, fastest-ever major milestone shift; Ads displayed within ChatGPT as OpenAI expands in Japan.

chunks.japanese: 史上最速の大台替わり

japanese_title: 6月18日（木）食品消費税27年4月に1% 新給付は27年秋と明記、築地・渋谷再開発にあわせ割安住宅 東京都がビル容積率2倍に
english_translation: June 18th (Thursday): Food consumption tax set to 1% in April 2025; new benefits explicitly for Autumn 2025; Tokyo Metropolitan Government to double building floor area ratio for affordable housing in conjunction with Tsukiji and Shibuya redevelopments.

chunks.meaning: explicitly stated as Autumn of year 27 (Reiwa 7 / 2025)
building floor area ratio / building plot ratio

japanese_title: 6月17日（水）日銀 1.0%への利上げ決定 国債買い入れ減額は27年4月以降停止、日経平均株価が連日最高値 6万9404円
english_translation: Wednesday, June 17: BOJ decides on interest rate hike to 1.0%, reduction of government bond purchases to be suspended from April 2027 onwards; Nikkei Stock Average hits record highs for consecutive days, reaching 69,404 yen

chunks.romaji: itten zero pāsento e no riage kettei
chunks.meaning: decision to raise interest rates to 1.0%

japanese_title: 6月16日（火）米イラン 戦闘終結の覚書合意、 JX金属 光通信の半導体材料を10倍に増産
english_translation: June 16 (Tuesday) US-Iran agreement on memorandum to end hostilities; JX Metals to increase production of semiconductor materials for optical communications tenfold

chunks.meaning: end of combat / cessation of hostilities
agreement on a memorandum of understanding (MOU)

japanese_title: 6月15日（月）日英 洋上風力や高温ガス炉開発で協力、アメリカとイラン 双方主張曲げず「合意」か
english_translation: June 15th (Mon) - Japan and the UK cooperate on offshore wind and high-temperature gas reactor development; US and Iran both refuse to back down, is an "agreement" in sight?

chunks.meaning: without yielding their assertions / not backing down on their claims
is there an "agreement"? / will they reach a consensus?

japanese_title: 6月14日（日）アンソロピック「ミュトス級AI」世界で停止、日産が社外取締役の任期を6年に短縮 27年から
english_translation: June 14th (Sunday) Anthropic's 'Mythos-class AI' suspended worldwide; Nissan to shorten outside directors' terms to 6 years starting in 2027

japanese_title: 6月13日（土）監視委がニデックに資料提出命令 調査に着手、学生寮のJSB 米ファンドのウォーバーグが買収へ
english_translation: June 13 (Sat): Surveillance Commission orders Nidec to submit documents and begins investigation; US fund Warburg to acquire student dorm operator JSB

chunks.meaning: the Surveillance Commission (Securities and Exchange Surveillance Commission) [subject]
Warburg (US private equity firm Warburg Pincus) [subject]
heading toward acquisition / set to acquire

japanese_title: 6月12日（金）何が変わった？新たな防災気象情報〜with NIKKEI
english_translation: June 12 (Fri) What has changed? New disaster prevention weather information ~with NIKKEI

chunks.meaning: changed? (past tense of 変わる - kawaru)
with NIKKEI (日本経済新聞 - Nihon Keizai Shimbun)

japanese_title: NIKKEI THE PITCH会議室 第19回 結局、誰が得をするのかーースタートアップM＆Aの本音
english_translation: NIKKEI THE PITCH Conference Room Episode 19: In the end, who actually benefits? — The real truth about startup M&A

chunks.meaning: NIKKEI THE PITCH Meeting Room / Conference Room
benefits? / is the one who gains?
real intentions / true feelings / the honest truth

japanese_title: 6月12日（金）AIなど軍民両用技術 日英がスタートアップ支援基金、日銀 異例の植田総裁不在で利上げへ
english_translation: June 12th (Friday) Dual-use technologies such as AI: Japan and UK to launch startup support fund; BOJ heads toward interest rate hike in the unusual absence of Governor Ueda

chunks.meaning: such as AI / AI and others

chunks.japanese: スタートアップ支援基金

chunks.meaning: due to the absence of Governor Ueda

japanese_title: 6月11日（木）信越化学 福井に18年ぶりレアアース工場、米スターバックス 日本事業の売却を検討
english_translation: June 11 (Thu) Shin-Etsu Chemical to build rare earth plant in Fukui for the first time in 18 years; US Starbucks considers selling Japanese operations

chunks.meaning: for the first time in 18 years
of Japan operations / of the Japanese business

japanese_title: 6月10日（水）日銀 6月利上げ1.0%へ 国債買い入れは減額停止で調整、トヨタ 自動運転ティアフォーに出資
english_translation: June 10 (Wednesday) Bank of Japan: Heading towards a 1.0% interest rate hike in June, JGB purchases being adjusted by suspending reduction; Toyota invests in self-driving company Tier IV

japanese_title: 6月9日（火）新AI銘柄パナソニックHD 関連売上2兆円へ、 TOTO ユニットバス受注を全面再開
english_translation: June 9 (Tuesday) New AI Stock Panasonic HD: Related Sales Towards 2 Trillion Yen, TOTO Fully Resumes Unit Bath Orders

japanese_title: 6月8日（月)年金3号「専業主夫」30年で3倍の13万人、ヤマダ・エディオン 統合交渉「対等合併」
english_translation: June 8 (Mon) Category 3 Pension: 'Stay-at-home husbands' triple in 30 years to 130,000; Yamada and Edion integration talks for a 'merger of equals'

chunks.meaning: Category 3 Pension (pension system for dependent spouses)
Yamada and Edion (major Japanese electronics retailers)

japanese_title: 6月7日（日）金融庁、「仕組み預金」にメス、企業の不動産売却18年ぶり高水準
english_translation: June 7th (Sun): Financial Services Agency cracks down on 'structured deposits'; corporate real estate sales hit highest level in 18 years

chunks.meaning: to take a scalpel to (idiom for cracking down on, investigating, or taking drastic measures against)
for the first time in 18 years

japanese_title: 6月6日（土）食品や日用品値上げ「実施・検討中」5割 包装見直し3割、アンソロピック｢AI開発減速｣提言
english_translation: June 6 (Sat) 50% of companies 'implementing or considering' price hikes for food and daily goods, 30% reviewing packaging; Anthropic proposes 'slowing down AI development'

chunks.meaning: and (connecting nouns in a non-exhaustive list)

japanese_title: 6月5日（金）タイパ追求、「ショート」化の行く先は？〜with NIKKEI
english_translation: June 5 (Fri) Pursuing 'Taipa' (Time-Performance): Where is the Trend Toward 'Short-Form' Heading? ~with NIKKEI

chunks.meaning: time-performance (portmanteau of 'time' and 'performance', referring to time efficiency)
where is it heading? / what is the destination?

japanese_title: 6月5日（金）PayPay 生命保険に参入、スタートアップ 創業期の資金調達4割減
english_translation: June 5 (Friday): PayPay enters the life insurance market; fundraising for early-stage startups down 40%

chunks.meaning: PayPay (a major Japanese mobile payment service)

japanese_title: 6月4日（木）日銀・植田総裁「利上げの是非しっかりと議論」、25年出生率は過去最低1.14 10年連続低下
english_translation: June 4th (Thursday) BOJ Governor Ueda: 'Thoroughly discuss the pros and cons of rate hikes'; '25 birth rate hits record low of 1.14, declining for 10 consecutive years

chunks.meaning: pros and cons / right or wrong
10 consecutive years / 10 years in a row

japanese_title: 6月3日（水）投資会社アドバンテッジ 3000億円買収ファンド 国内企業の再編促す、半導体市場の成長率過去最高 26年90%に
english_translation: June 3rd (Wed) - Investment firm Advantage's 300 billion yen buyout fund prompts restructuring of domestic companies; Semiconductor market growth rate at record high, reaching 90% by 2026

chunks.meaning: record high / highest ever in history

japanese_title: 6月2日（火）NVIDIAがAIパソコン向け半導体「Windows」で高性能モデル操作、ソフトバンクGの時価総額49兆円
english_translation: June 2nd (Tuesday): NVIDIA operates high-performance models using 'Windows' semiconductors for AI PCs; SoftBank Group's market capitalization is 49 trillion yen.

chunks.meaning: operates high-performance models / high-performance model operation

japanese_title: 6月1日（月）高市内閣支持3ポイント低下66%、メガソーラー乱開発防止へ環境アセス拡大
english_translation: June 1st (Monday): Takaichi Cabinet Support drops 3 points to 66%; Environmental assessment expanded to prevent reckless development of mega solar.

chunks.meaning: assessment (short for アセスメント)

japanese_title: 5月31日（日） 日英防衛相 次期戦闘機開発で連携と一致、不動産クラファン 利回り根拠の開示を義務に
english_translation: May 31st (Sunday): Japan-UK Defense Ministers Agree on Cooperation for Next-Generation Fighter Jet Development; Obligation to Disclose Basis for Yields in Real Estate Crowdfunding.

chunks.meaning: Make it an obligation / Into an obligation

japanese_title: 5月30日（土）ビール「23円減税」 物価高で8割帳消し、トヨタ新社長 EV選別へ大なた
english_translation: May 30th (Sat): Beer "23 Yen Tax Cut" 80% Offset by High Prices, Toyota's New President Takes Drastic Measures for EV Selection

japanese_title: 5月29日（金）「壁に貼ったバナナ」で９億円、現代アートの歴史と経済〜with NIKKEI
english_translation: May 29th (Friday) - 900 Million Yen for 'Banana Taped to a Wall': The History and Economy of Contemporary Art ~with NIKKEI
